## 🎨 UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Used proper HTML elements for their intended purpose.
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation:** Ensured all interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Added descriptive ARIA labels to icon-only buttons and complex components.
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Verified that text and UI elements meet WCAG AA contrast standards.
- [ ] **Focus States:** Visible focus indicators are present for all interactive elements.
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** Tested the UI on multiple screen sizes.
